title: Retry logic for Open VSX publishing workflow

source.subject: feat(ci): implement retry logic for Open VSX publishing

body:
Implements **retry logic** for flaky Open VSX publishing steps.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`6dce9e6`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/6dce9e6)
- **Subject:** feat(ci): implement retry logic for Open VSX publishing
- **Completed:** 2026-04-22

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `editor-extension`
- **Deliverable:** `v01-open-vsx`

## Relation
Reliability layer on the Open VSX workflow.
